description: UI/UX overhaul: Simplify stocks page flow (single button auto-fetch+analyze), improve index page one-click experience, enhance personas page with model badges and quick-action, add settings presets, global UX improvements (Enter submit, loading skeleton with progress, error states, CSS polish)
steps: 1. STOCKS PAGE (dashboard/templates/stocks.html): Remove the separate '自动获取' button. Make the single '分析' button do auto-fetch + analyze in one step (it already does this via auto_fetch=true when no metrics provided - just remove the confusing separate button). Hide advanced metrics by default (already hidden). Add a big hero-style input at top. Show loading skeleton with progress text '正在分析... (X/18 完成)' during analysis.

2. STOCKS PAGE: After results load, show a large consensus signal banner FIRST (already exists), then make agent cards collapsible by default (already collapsed). Add fade-in animation to results. Add inline error panel with retry button (already exists in HTML but improve styling).

3. INDEX PAGE (dashboard/templates/index.html): Change the hero section to say '输入股票代码，一键获得18位大师共识'. Make the hero input + button the primary focus. When user types ticker and clicks '分析', auto-fetch from yfinance AND run analysis (not just redirect to /stocks). Show the result INLINE (signal banner + score + reasoning) below the input, not just a toast. Show recent analyses from localStorage below (already exists).

4. PERSONAS PAGE (dashboard/templates/personas.html): Add colored model badge for each persona (Anthropic/Claude=blue, DeepSeek=green, GPT=teal, Kimi=purple) using the existing .provider-badge CSS classes in bloomberg.css. Add a quick '分析' action button on each persona card row that opens a small ticker input popup or redirects to /stocks?persona=X.

5. SETTINGS PAGE (dashboard/templates/settings.html): Add preset buttons at top: '全部Claude' / '中国投资人用DeepSeek' / '最强配置'. These set all dropdowns at once. Show the unsaved indicator more prominently (larger, with text '未保存'). The batch save already exists ('全部保存' button).

6. GLOBAL UX - base.html and bloomberg.css: Ensure all forms submit on Enter key (already handled in most places via onkeydown). Add global CSS for better card shadows/depth (.card:hover box-shadow), smoother transitions, better input focus states (already has orange glow). Add fade-in animation utility class. Add skeleton loading states for index and stocks pages.

7. CSS IMPROVEMENTS (dashboard/static/css/bloomberg.css): Add .card hover elevation (subtle translateY + box-shadow). Add .fade-in animation class. Add .progress-bar CSS for analysis progress. Improve mobile touch targets (min-height 44px for buttons). Add .preset-btn class for settings presets. Add .inline-result class for index page inline analysis results. Add better .hero-section styling.
acceptance_criteria: Stocks page: single '分析' button triggers auto-fetch + analysis in one step, no separate '自动获取' button
Index page: analysis runs inline and shows results below the input without redirecting
Personas page: model badges show with provider-specific colors
Settings page: preset buttons appear and work (set all dropdowns)
Loading state shows skeleton cards during analysis
All existing functionality still works (API endpoints, navigation, etc.)
verification: python -c "from dashboard.app import app; routes = [r.path for r in app.routes]; assert '/stocks' in routes; assert '/api/analyze/{ticker}' in routes; print('All routes OK')"
